text.message: stop complaining as if you don't know what's going on
the nonsense that solos are bad plays is just dense thinking
dead last but enjoy a 1/5 try
black why are you helping the leader?
that's a lot worse than a solo block
so you have no problem pointing out a solo block
or listing the odds that the leader has to rob you
but explaining a beginner's mistake is something you can't do?
not wasting my time with idiots
Ill get you for that one lol
blues game to lose anyway so dont really care :)
then we can focus on blue
